response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architectural and DevOps exposure, but his seniority far exceeds the junior/mid-level role, and his German language barrier and high on-site requirement pose practical risks despite his impressive technical depth.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Extensive DevOps and infrastructure exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; risk of low retention or mismatched expectations
Only basic German proficiency despite high on-site requirement in Berlin
Resume emphasizes DLang and embedded systems, potentially diluting focus on core stack
